title: Tender Crispy Argentinian Beef Empanadas
description: Indulge in the rich flavors of Argentina with these crispy empanadas filled with tender beef and onions, fried to perfection in sunflower oil. Perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: ground beef
ingredients.notes: rested meat, 80/20 lean to fat ratio

instructions: Preheat the sunflower oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of ground beef and onion mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Repeat with the remaining dough and filling.
Fry the empanadas in batches until they are golden brown and crispy.
Drain the empanadas on paper towels and serve hot.
Season with salt, black pepper, and paprika to taste.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
